metadata.name: Correct a Name on a Booking

description: A customer made a booking online but misspelled their last name. They need to correct it to match their passport.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the booking and verify the passenger's identity.
Explain the airline's policy on name corrections, which may involve a fee.
Process the name correction in the reservation system and reissue the ticket with the correct name.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully corrects the name on the ticket.
